question: Demonstrate multi-level inheritance by creating a hierarchy: `Animal` (base) -> `Mammal` -> `Dog`. Add unique characteristics (members or methods) at each level and show object creation and method calls.

test_cases.expected:
--- Demonstrating multi-level inheritance with a Dog object ---
Animal constructor called for Canine
Mammal constructor called for Canine with Golden fur.
Dog constructor called for Canine of breed Golden Retriever.

Dog Details:
Species: Canine
Fur Color: Golden
Breed: Golden Retriever
Canine (Golden Retriever) is enthusiastically eating dog kibble.
Canine (a mammal) is giving birth to live young.
Canine (Golden Retriever) barks: Woof! Woof!

--- Demonstrating polymorphic behavior with smart pointers ---
Animal constructor called for Canine
Mammal constructor called for Canine with Black fur.
Dog constructor called for Canine of breed Labrador.
Polymorphic Animal (Dog) Species: Canine
Canine (Labrador) is enthusiastically eating dog kibble.
Smart pointer will handle deletion automatically, calling virtual destructors.

--- Demonstration finished. Objects will be destructed. ---
Dog destructor called for Canine (breed: Labrador).
Mammal destructor called for Canine
Animal destructor called for Canine
Dog destructor called for Canine (breed: Golden Retriever).
Mammal destructor called for Canine
Animal destructor called for Canine
